---
title: "Ayon Ganguly"
image: "me-croped.JPG"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your_email@iitg.ac.in
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ayonganguly
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.co.in/
---


I am an assistant professor at the [Department of Mathematics](https://www.iitg.ac.in/maths/){target="_blank"}, [Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati](https://www.iitg.ac.in/){target="_blank"}. Before moving
to Guwahati, I worked as assistant professor at [Indian Institute of Information
Technology, Allahabad](https://www.iiita.ac.in/){target="_blank"}. I did my PhD
in Statistics from the [Department of Mathematics and
Statistics](https://www.iitk.ac.in/math/){target="_blank"}, [Indian Institute of
Technology Kanpur](https://www.iitk.ac.in/){target="_blank"}, under the
supervision of [Prof. Debasis
Kundu](http://home.iitk.ac.in/~kundu/kundu.html){target="_blank"} and [Prof.
Sharmishtha Mitra](http://home.iitk.ac.in/~smitra/){target="_blank"}.

I work in broad area of reliability and survival analysis. I am interested in
censored data, truncated data, competing risks data, data obtained from
accelerated life tests.
